raw_title: Soledad Núñez: Climate risk and sustainable finance - bridging policy, research and practice
raw_content: Speech by Ms Soledad Núñez, Deputy Governor of the Bank of Spain, at  the High-Level Conference "Climate risk and sustainable finance: bridging policy, research and practice", jointly organised with the Network for Greening the Financial System (NGFS), the Centre for Economic Transition Expertise (CETEx), and the TPI Global Climate Transition Centre, both at London School of Economics, Madrid, 25 March 2026.
